title: Voyagermap
description: Voyagermap is a minimap and worldmap mod for Minecraft 1.19.4, designed to enhance your navigation and exploration experience.
body:
# Welcome to Voyagermap: A Minecraft Mod
![Main minimap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EUkNYLLE/images/02a97627891ffc9ca0eb6b67e9487642153f8eff.png)
![Worldmap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EUkNYLLE/images/b458608d7380df5ed1b37ce8edd94fa8c20114a1.png)
## What is this mod?

Voyagermap is a minimap and worldmap mod for Minecraft 1.19.4, designed to enhance your navigation and exploration experience.

## What does this mod do?

- **Minimap and World Map**: Voyagermap allows you to see the world around you that you have loaded, including players and mobs in your environment.
- **World Map Overview**: It offers a detailed world map with zoom capabilities and teleport commands for an expansive view of your entire world.
- **Waypoints System**: Easily mark places of interest with the built-in waypoints system, which aids in quick location and navigation. These waypoints are visible on both the minimap and the world map.
- **Cave View**: If the cave mode is enabled, Voyagermap lets you see caves, providing a comprehensive underground navigation experience.

## Features
### Worldmap
- **Exportable map(Options coming soon)** Export the world map into and image to share with freinds!
- **Detailed Overview**: Get a comprehensive view of your entire world, including loaded chunks and points of interest.
- **Zoom and Teleport**: Zoom in and out for different levels of detail and use the right click menu for teleport commands for quick travel.
- **Customizability**: Set custom keybinds, edit veiwing settings, and also radar settings
### Minimap
- **All entity radar**: shows all entitys on the map including boats and other dropped items
- **Real-Time Environment View**: See the world around you in real-time, including nearby players and mobs.
- **Custom Waypoints**: Mark and manage waypoints for easy navigation and location tracking.
- **Cave Mapping**: If enabled, view underground caves to aid in your spelunking adventures.


## FAQ

### Q: How do I open the worldmap?
A: To open the worldmap, press the default key **'M'**. You can change this keybinding in the settings menu if needed.

### Q: How do I set a waypoint?
A: To set a waypoint, open the minimap by pressing the default key **'N'**, then configure the settings to your liking and click **"Done"** To save the waypoint.

### Q: Can I see other players on the map?
A: Yes, Voyagermap allows you to see nearby players on both the minimap and worldmap, as long as they are within your chunks.

### Q: How do I enable cave view?
A: To enable cave view, go the worldmap,click options,look for "Enable Cave Mode:" and change as you wish.

### Q: Where is the options menu?
A: The options menu is located in the bottom right corner of the worldmap, which you can open by pressing **'M'** by default.

### Q: How do I zoom the minimap?
A: To zoom the minimap, press the default key **'Z'** to cycle through different zoom levels. Note that in release 0.125, zooming only works with filtering enabled.

### Q: The worldmap is blurry. What do I do?
A: If the worldmap appears blurry, go to the options menu, navigate to "Details/Performance," and turn off filtering.

### Q: How can I zoom further in the worldmap? It's stopping my zoom.
A: To zoom further in the worldmap, go to the options menu, navigate to "Worldmap," and adjust the minimum and maximum zoom levels to your preference.
## Support me on patreon
You can donate here https://www.patreon.com/hotsuop
## Is this mod client or server side or both?
### Client-Side Features

- **Cave Mapping:** Allows users to map caves in their Minecraft world.
- **Radar:** Displays nearby entities or players.

### Server-Side Configuration

When installed on a server, administrators can control certain options using chat commands:

- **Disable Cave Mapping:** Admins can disable cave mapping for all users by entering `§3 §6 §3 §6 §3 §6 §d`. This command disables cave mapping on the server.

- **Disable Radar:** Admins can disable the radar for all users by entering `§3 §6 §3 §6 §3 §6 §e`. This command disables the radar feature for all users.

- **Enable Cave Mapping:** Admins can enable cave mapping for all users by entering `§3 §6 §3 §6 §3 §6 §f`. This command enables cave mapping on the server.

- **Enable Radar:** Admins can enable the radar for all users by entering `§3 §6 §3 §6 §3 §6 §0`. This command enables the radar feature for all users.
## Simple tips and how too's
You can bind a copy cords button in the optons menu
